ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_no" TEXT /* Roll number of the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the student is currently in */,
  "batch" TEXT /* Batch of the student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Code for the subject */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student the grade belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "grade_point" TEXT /* Grade point value for the grade */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpa" (
  "gpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPA entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student the GPA belongs to */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for which the GPA is calculated */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Calculated GPA for the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpa_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (student, faculty, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade change entry */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the grade entry that was changed */,
  "old_grade" TEXT /* Old grade value before the change */,
  "new_grade" TEXT /* New grade value after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the grade change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_history_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the faculty member is assigned to */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_faculty_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)
